tabs.body:
## Memasang SSL Untuk Server cPanel (PunchSalad)

1. **Buka link berikut pada browser: https://punchsalad.com/ssl-certificate-generator/**
2. **Lengkapi form yang tersedia** 

   ![](/assets/images/uploads/pasang-ssl-certificate/t11.png)
3. **Download file yang disediakan**
4. **Login ke GoDaddy, lalu masuk halaman My Products** 

   ![](/assets/images/uploads/pasang-ssl-certificate/t12.png)
5. **Pada bagian Web Hosting, klik tombol Manage pada server yang diinginkan** 

   ![](/assets/images/uploads/pasang-ssl-certificate/t13.png)
6. **Masuk ke cPanel Admin** 
7. **Pada menu File Manager, upload file yang sebelumnya didownload ke direktori → public_html/.well-known/acme-challenge** 

   ![](/assets/images/uploads/pasang-ssl-certificate/t14.png)
8. **Lakukan step 3 yang tertera pada halaman punchsalad. Jika sudah berhasil, klik tombol Verify Domain** 

   ![](/assets/images/uploads/pasang-ssl-certificate/t15.png)
9. **Masuk ke menu SSL/TLS pada cPanel Admin, lalu klik tombol manage SSL sites**

   ![](/assets/images/uploads/pasang-ssl-certificate/t16.png)
10. **Pilih domain larona.id. Salin sertifikat pertama pada file CRT + CA bundle dari PunchSalad di bagian Certificate: (CRT)** 

    ![](/assets/images/uploads/pasang-ssl-certificate/t17.png)
11. **Salin dua sertifikat di bawahnya di bagian Certificate Authority Bundle: (CABUNDLE)** 

    ![](/assets/images/uploads/pasang-ssl-certificate/t18.png)
12. **Salin private key di bagian Private Key (KEY)**

    ![](/assets/images/uploads/pasang-ssl-certificate/t19.png)
13. **Klik tombol Install Certificate**
